message:
feat(core): sharded counters, concurrent map, and contention benchmarks (wa-1sm78)

Lock-free data structures for hot paths:
- ShardedCounter: cache-line-padded per-core atomic counters (no false sharing)
- ShardedMax: sharded CAS-based maximum tracker
- ShardedGauge: sharded last-write-wins gauge for timestamps
- PaneMap: Fibonacci-hashed concurrent map optimized for pane ID lookups
- ShardedMap: generic sharded concurrent hash map
- Criterion benchmarks comparing AtomicU64/RwLock<HashMap> vs sharded variants

50 tests (27 counter + 23 map) including concurrent stress tests.
128-byte alignment prevents false sharing on both x86_64 and Apple Silicon.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -186,6 +186,10 @@ name = "spike_comparison"
 harness = false
 required-features = ["asupersync-runtime"]
 
+[[bench]]
+name = "lockfree_contention"
+harness = false
+
 [features]
 default = []
 # Public feature flags (stable surface)
